programme.title: New Girl
programme.desc: Cece convinces Jess that Nick likes her more than just as a roommate and Schmidt tries to seal the deal with Cece.

programme.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
programme.desc: Having moved from China, a middle-aged woman finds herself entangled in a wild journey. She alone holds the key to preserving reality, as she traverses alternate universes and encounters the various lives she might have lived.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
programme.desc: Will goes with Phillip and Carlton to buy a new car. When Carlton wants Phillip to buy a car that Will thinks is dull, Will convinces Phillip to get a convertible. The owner of the lot offers Will a job and Will accepts. It isn't long that Will is the best salesman on the lot and he's being considered for an executive position so he drops out of school.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Graham and Barbara Yellow pride themselves on offering basic facilities for great value at the White Swan Hotel. But will their guests be happy to pay a supplement for breakfast?
